data.name: Meganium

abilities.name: Wild Growth
abilities.text: Each Basic Grass Energy attached to all of your Pokémon provides GrassGrass Energy. The effect of Wild Growth doesn't stack.

data.flavor_text: Anyone who stands beside it becomes refreshed, just as if they were soaking in the soothing atmosphere of a forest.

data.name: Inteleon

attacks.name: Bring Down
attacks.text: Choose a Pokémon in play (yours or your opponent's) that has the least HP remaining, except for this Pokémon, and it is Knocked Out.

attacks.name: Water Shot
attacks.text: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

data.flavor_text: It uses special lenses in its eyes to sense things about its opponents—like their body heat—then attacks once it identifies a weak spot.

data.name: Alakazam

abilities.name: Psychic Draw
abilities.text: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may use this Ability. Draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Powerful Hand
attacks.text: Place 2 damage counters on your opponent's Active Pokémon for each card in your hand.

data.flavor_text: Alakazam wields potent psychic powers. It's said that this Pokémon used these powers to create the spoons it holds.

data.name: Lunatone

abilities.name: Lunar Cycle
abilities.text: Once during your turn, if you have Solrock in play, you may discard a Basic Fighting Energy card from your hand in order to use this Ability. Draw 3 cards. You can't use more than 1 Lunar Cycle Ability each turn.

data.flavor_text: It was discovered at the site of a meteor strike 40 years ago. Its stare can lull its foes to sleep.

data.name: Drifloon

attacks.name: Pull
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot.

data.flavor_text: It is whispered that any child who mistakes Drifloon for a balloon and holds on to it could wind up missing.

data.name: Drifblim

attacks.name: Creepy Wind
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Balloon Return
attacks.text: Put this Pokémon and all attached cards into your hand.

data.flavor_text: It can generate and release gas within its body. That's how it can control the altitude of its drift.

data.name: Psyduck

abilities.name: Damp
abilities.text: Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) lose any Ability that requires the Pokémon using it to Knock Out itself.

data.flavor_text: It is constantly wracked by a headache. When the headache turns intense, it begins using mysterious powers.

data.name: Golduck

abilities.name: Damp
abilities.text: Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) lose any Ability that requires the Pokémon using it to Knock Out itself.

attacks.name: Hydro Pump
attacks.text: This attack does 20 more damage for each Water Energy attached to this Pokémon.

data.flavor_text: When it swims at full speed using its long, webbed limbs, its forehead somehow begins to glow.

data.name: Alakazam

abilities.name: Psychic Draw
abilities.text: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may use this Ability. Draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Powerful Hand
attacks.text: Place 2 damage counters on your opponent's Active Pokémon for each card in your hand.

data.flavor_text: Alakazam wields potent psychic powers. It's said that this Pokémon used these powers to create the spoons it holds.

data.name: Riolu

attacks.name: Accelerating Stab
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Accelerating Stab.

data.flavor_text: They communicate with one another using their auras. They are able to run all through the night.

data.name: Mega Latias ex

attacks.name: Strafe
attacks.text: You may switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Illusory Impulse
attacks.text: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.

rules: Mega Evolution ex Rule: When your Mega Evolution Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

data.name: Mega Lucario ex

attacks.name: Aura Jab
attacks.text: Attach up to 3 Basic Fighting Energy cards from your discard pile to your Benched Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Mega Brave
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Mega Brave.

rules: Mega Evolution ex Rule: When your Mega Evolution Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

data.name: Mega Venusaur ex

abilities.name: Solar Transfer
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn, you may use this Ability. Move a Basic Grass Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Jungle Dump
attacks.text: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

rules: Mega Evolution ex Rule: When your Mega Evolution Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

data.name: Ceruledge

attacks.name: Infernal Slash
attacks.text: Discard 4 Basic Fire Energy cards from your hand. If you can't discard 4 cards in this way, this attack does nothing.

data.flavor_text: The fiery blades on its arms burn fiercely with the lingering resentment of a sword wielder who fell before accomplishing their goal.

data.name: Zacian

attacks.name: Limit Break
attacks.text: If your opponent has 3 or fewer Prize cards remaining, this attack does 90 more damage.

data.flavor_text: Able to cut down anything with a single strike, it became known as the Fairy King's Sword, and it inspired awe in friend and foe alike.

data.name: Flygon

abilities.name: Sandy Flapping
abilities.text: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may use this Ability. You may also use this Ability if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent's Pokémon. Discard the top 2 cards of your opponent's deck.

data.flavor_text: Known as the Desert Spirit, this Pokémon hides in the sandstorms it causes by beating its wings.

data.name: Toxtricity

abilities.name: Sinister Surge
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may use this Ability. Search your deck for a Basic Darkness Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Benched Darkness Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck. If you attached Energy to a Pokémon in this way, place 2 damage counters on that Pokémon.

data.flavor_text: As it scatters toxic sweat and emits electricity, a melody that sounds like it came from a guitar reverberates through the surrounding area.

data.name: Cottonee

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.text: Draw a card.

data.flavor_text: Pillows and beds stuffed with cotton exhaled by Cottonee are soft and puffy, light and airy— altogether top quality.

data.name: Whimsicott

attacks.name: Healing Fluff
attacks.text: Heal all damage from 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: U-turn
attacks.text: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

data.flavor_text: Like the wind, it can slip through any gap, no matter how small. It leaves balls of white fluff behind.

data.name: Sneasel
data.flavor_text: This cunning Pokémon hides under the cover of darkness, waiting to attack its prey.

data.name: Weavile

attacks.name: Retaliatory Claw
attacks.text: If this Pokémon's remaining HP is 50 or less, this attack does 170 more damage.

data.flavor_text: Evolution made it even more devious. It communicates by clawing signs in boulders.

data.name: Charcadet

attacks.name: Gather Strength
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

data.flavor_text: Burnt charcoal came to life and became a Pokémon. Possessing a fiery fighting spirit, Charcadet will battle even tough opponents.

data.name: Mega Charizard X ex

attacks.name: Inferno X
attacks.text: Discard any amount of Fire Energy from among your Pokémon, and this attack does 90 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

rules: Mega Evolution ex Rule: When your Mega Evolution Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

data.name: Oricorio ex

abilities.name: Excited Turbo
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn, if you have any Fire Mega Evolution Pokémon ex in play, you may use this Ability. Attach a Basic Fire Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Benched Fire Pokémon.

rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

data.name: Mega Kangaskhan ex

abilities.name: Run Errand
abilities.text: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may use this Ability. Draw 2 cards. You can't use more than 1 Run Errand Ability each turn.

attacks.name: Rapid-Fire Combo
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 50 more damage for each heads.

rules: Mega Evolution ex Rule: When your Mega Evolution Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

data.name: Meloetta

attacks.name: Soothing Melody
attacks.text: Heal 120 damage from 1 of your Benched Psychic Pokémon.

data.flavor_text: Its melodies are sung with a special vocalization method that can control the feelings of those who hear it.

data.name: Haunter
data.flavor_text: It likes to lurk in the dark and tap shoulders with a gaseous hand. Its touch causes endless shuddering.

data.name: Celebratory Fanfare
rules: Once during each player's turn, that player may heal 10 damage from each of their Pokémon. If a player healed any damage in this way, their turn ends.
You may play only 1 Stadium card during your turn. Put it next to the Active Spot, and discard it if another Stadium comes into play. A Stadium with the same name can't be played.

attacks.name: Inferno X
attacks.text: Discard any amount of Fire Energy from among your Pokémon, and this attack does 90 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

attacks.name: Explosion Y
attacks.text: Discard 3 Energy from this Pokémon, and this attack does 280 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

data.name: N's Zekrom

attacks.name: Shred
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Rampaging Thunder
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use attacks.

data.flavor_text: When the interior part of its tail spins like a motor, Zekrom can generate many bolts of lightning to blast its surrounds.
